title: Palindrome Partition Minimum Cuts
hints: Try dynamic programming. Let dp[i] be the min cuts for s[0..i]. How do you update it using previous values?
Check if a substring s[j..i] is a palindrome. If yes, dp[i] can be dp[j-1] + 1. Handle j=0 as a special case.
Precompute palindrome checks for all substrings to avoid redundant work. Then fill the dp table from left to right.
